title: The Yes/No/Maybe Framework Carousel

hook_slide.headline: Unlock Deeper Intimacy: Your Yes/No/Maybe Guide
hook_slide.subline: Discover how this simple framework transforms your communication and connection.
hook_slide.image_concept: Dark, warm, textured background with subtle, abstract shapes suggesting connection and dialogue. Minimalist aesthetic.

education_slides.headline: What is Yes/No/Maybe?
education_slides.body: It's a powerful consent and preference tool, allowing partners to clearly express desires and boundaries without pressure or guesswork.
education_slides.image_concept: Soft, diffused light highlighting two intertwining lines on a muted background, symbolizing connection and clarity.

education_slides.headline: Embracing the 'YES'
education_slides.body: 'Yes' means enthusiastic consent. It's about full engagement, comfort, and a genuine desire to participate. Celebrate these shared moments.
education_slides.image_concept: A vibrant, warm color accent against a dark background, suggesting affirmation and positive energy.

education_slides.headline: Honoring the 'NO'
education_slides.body: 'No' is a complete boundary. It's crucial for safety and trust. Respecting 'no' builds a foundation of unwavering security and authentic intimacy.
education_slides.image_concept: A calm, solid barrier or a gentle, protective shadow effect, conveying safety and respect.

education_slides.headline: Exploring the 'MAYBE'
education_slides.body: 'Maybe' signifies curiosity with caution. It invites conversation, negotiation, and clarification. It's an opportunity to explore together safely.
education_slides.image_concept: A subtle gradient or a path branching, representing exploration and open possibilities with thoughtfulness.

education_slides.headline: Why This Framework Works
education_slides.body: It removes assumptions, reduces anxiety, and empowers both partners. Clear communication fosters deeper understanding and mutual respect in all interactions.
education_slides.image_concept: Interlocking geometric shapes forming a balanced structure, symbolizing harmony and clear understanding.

education_slides.headline: Introducing it to Your Partner
education_slides.body: Start with a calm, open conversation. Frame it as a tool for enhancing shared experiences and strengthening your bond, not a test.
education_slides.image_concept: Two abstract figures gently leaning towards each other, suggesting a supportive and open dialogue.

education_slides.headline: Practice Makes Perfect
education_slides.body: Begin with low-stakes topics. Regularly check in with each other. This builds comfort and confidence in expressing your authentic self.
education_slides.image_concept: A visual metaphor of growth, like a subtle ripple effect expanding or a path gradually becoming clearer.

framework_slide.title: Your Yes/No/Maybe Communication Toolkit
items: YES: Enthusiastic consent. Full engagement and desire.
NO: Clear boundary. Non-negotiable, respect is paramount.
MAYBE: Curious, with conditions. Open to discussion and exploration.
Revisit and adapt as your comfort evolves.
framework_slide.image_concept: Clean, infographic style with the three terms clearly separated by distinct but harmonious colors, perhaps with minimalist icons.

cta_slide.headline: Curated by Dark Fantasy
cta_slide.image_concept: Minimal Dark Fantasy logo centered on a warm, inviting, subtly textured background.

caption: Tired of guesswork? The Yes/No/Maybe framework is your key to clear communication and deeper intimacy.
